# Nimara
> Modern headless e-commerce storefront built on Saleor

Nimara is an open-source headless e-commerce platform built with Next.js, TypeScript, and React Server Components on top of Saleor. It supports multi-channel, multi-currency storefronts, Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP) for agentic commerce, Stripe payments, a vendor marketplace, and Terraform-based infrastructure deployment.

Source: https://github.com/mirumee/nimara-ecommerce
Docs: https://docs.nimara.store

## Docs

- [Overview](docs/01-Intro.md): Introduction to Nimara, architecture, and feature index
- [Developer Onboarding](docs/02-Onboarding.md): Onboarding guide for new developers
- [Daily Workflow & Releasing](docs/03-Release-workflow.md): Development workflow and release process

## Quickstart

- [Running Locally](docs/04-Quickstart/01-Running-locally.md): Local dev setup with Saleor Cloud or local Saleor
- [Storefront](docs/04-Quickstart/02-Storefront.md): Production deployment to Vercel, webhook setup
- [Environment Variables](docs/04-Quickstart/03-Environment-variables.md): All env vars with descriptions and examples
- [Saleor CMS](docs/04-Quickstart/04-Saleor-cms.md): Homepage, navigation, and static page setup via Saleor dashboard
- [Add New Channel](docs/04-Quickstart/05-Add-new-channel.md): Multi-locale, multi-language, multi-market configuration

## Integrations

- [UCP Integration](docs/05-Integrations/01-Ucp-integration.md): Universal Commerce Protocol — agentic commerce REST API for AI agents and platforms
- [Stripe Integration](docs/05-Integrations/02-Stripe-integration.md): Stripe payment processing via Python or TypeScript app

## Advanced

- [Marketplace](docs/06-Advanced/01-Marketplace.md): Vendor marketplace app — setup, features, and deployment
- [Terraform](docs/06-Advanced/02-Using-terraform.md): Infrastructure as code deployment to Vercel
- [i18n](docs/06-Advanced/03-I18n.md): Internationalization architecture, locale overrides, message composition
